heading_content_part: Privacy policyFlashlight by Szymon Dyja - Privacy policyApplication is simple android application that turns mobile device into a flashlight.Application features:2 light sources (if available)2 bright modes: always ON or strobe/blinking/flashing with frequency to choose from8 colors screen to choose fromAuto Light ON when you launch appClear and modern designWidget - turn on/off light from home screenIt works on the locked screen
What information we collect?Application does not collect personal information like name, surname, age, place of birth.

AdvertisementThe application may display advertisements. We use Facebook Audience Network for this purpose. For more details, visit the following pages.Facebook Audience Network Policy -https://developers.facebook.com/docs/audience-network/policy/Community Standards -https://www.facebook.com/communitystandards/Facebook Audience Network Terms -https://www.facebook.com/ads/manage/audience_network/publisher_tos/
